ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of instrument (e.g., stock, commodity, currency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the instrument */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the instrument */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the market data belongs to */,
  "market_date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the instrument traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the instrument on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markets_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trading strategy */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the trading strategy (e.g., risk tolerance, stop-loss) */,
  "risk_tolerance" REAL /* Risk tolerance of the trading strategy */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss level of the trading strategy */,
  "position_sizing" REAL /* Position sizing of the trading strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_management" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk management setting */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy the risk setting belongs to */,
  "risk_type" TEXT /* Type of risk (e.g., market risk, credit risk) */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Level of risk (e.g., high, low) */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the risk setting (e.g., stop-loss, position sizing) */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop-loss level of the risk setting */,
  "position_sizing" REAL /* Position sizing of the risk setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., return, volatility) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy the trade belongs to */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the trade belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission of the trade */,
  "slippage" REAL /* Slippage of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES trading_strategies ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical trade entry */,
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trade the historical entry belongs to */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of the historical trade */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the trade */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the trade */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission of the trade */,
  "slippage" REAL /* Slippage of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_history_trade_id FOREIGN KEY ("trade_id") REFERENCES trades ("trade_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the news article is related to */,
  "news_date" TEXT /* Date of the news article */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "article" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis entry */,
  "news_id" INTEGER /* ID of the news article the sentiment analysis belongs to */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the news article (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_type" TEXT /* Type of sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_news_id FOREIGN KEY ("news_id") REFERENCES news ("news_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the market trend belongs to */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the market trend */,
  "trend_type" TEXT /* Type of market trend (e.g., upward, downward) */,
  "trend_strength" REAL /* Strength of the market trend (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "trend_score" REAL /* Score of the market trend (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the alert belongs to */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date of the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility" (
  "volatility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the volatility belongs to */,
  "volatility_date" TEXT /* Date of the volatility */,
  "volatility_level" REAL /* Level of the volatility (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "volatility_score" REAL /* Score of the volatility (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volatility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volatility_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "/macd" (
  "macd_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MACD entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the MACD belongs to */,
  "macd_date" TEXT /* Date of the MACD */,
  "macd_line" REAL /* MACD line of the MACD */,
  "signal_line" REAL /* Signal line of the MACD */,
  "histogram" REAL /* Histogram of the MACD */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("macd_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rsi" (
  "rsi_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each RSI entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the RSI belongs to */,
  "rsi_date" TEXT /* Date of the RSI */,
  "rsi_level" REAL /* Level of the RSI (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "rsi_score" REAL /* Score of the RSI (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rsi_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rsi_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bollinger_bands" (
  "bb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Bollinger Bands entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instrument the Bollinger Bands belongs to */,
  "bb_date" TEXT /* Date of the Bollinger Bands */,
  "middle_band" REAL /* Middle band of the Bollinger Bands */,
  "upper_band" REAL /* Upper band of the Bollinger Bands */,
  "lower_band" REAL /* Lower band of the Bollinger Bands */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bollinger_bands_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
